brief_notes: Conveys the main findings coherently but is severely lacking in detail. No tables or figures are present, and the Methods section is a single short paragraph. Key quantitative details (cofactor concentrations, statistical thresholds, replicate counts) are mostly absent from the Results. The narrative logic is preserved from the skill version but the paper reads more like an extended abstract than a full manuscript. The introduction is also too brief to adequately set up the controversy being resolved.
